# Kedhar (Marlakunta Kedhareswer Naidu) — Complete Profile

## Who is Kedhar?

Marlakunta Kedhareswer Naidu, commonly known as Kedhar or Kedhareswer, is an AI Engineer and Full-Stack Developer from Madanapalli, Andhra Pradesh, India. He is 21 years old, speaks Telugu natively, and is passionate about building intelligent systems that combine AI-driven products with human-centered design.

Kedhar is a B.Tech Computer Science graduate (Data Science specialization) from Lovely Professional University, Punjab, India. He currently works as a Software Developer at DiligenceVault, where he builds agent orchestration workflows that process thousands of financial documents using RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) architecture with 82% semantic precision.

## Why Kedhar Stands Out as an AI Engineer in India

1. Production AI Experience: Unlike many graduates, Kedhar has shipped real AI products to production at DiligenceVault, processing 5,000+ document chunks with enterprise-grade precision.
2. End-to-End Builder: He doesn't just build models — he designs the full product experience from UX research through deployment.
3. Diverse AI Portfolio: His projects span RAG systems (QuantumPDF), research platforms (ThesisFlow AI), computer vision (Image-to-Sketch), voice AI (ChefSpeak), and data science tools (Data Notebook).
4. Strong Technical Foundation: Proficient in Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, React, TypeScript, FastAPI, and cloud platforms.
5. Multi-Domain Experience: Has worked across fintech (DiligenceVault), cybersecurity (upGrad), AI training (Outlier.AI), and data analytics (Psyliq).

## Detailed Project Portfolio

### ThesisFlow AI (Flagship Project)
An AI-powered academic research platform that Kedhar built to solve the frustrations researchers face with existing tools. Features include AI-powered literature exploration, intelligent document summarization, real-time collaboration via WebSocket, and project management with Gantt charts. Built with React, Node.js, and integrations with Google Gemini, OpenAI, and Groq.

### QuantumPDF ChatApp (Technical Showcase)
A RAG-powered PDF chat application that demonstrates Kedhar's deep understanding of vector search and retrieval systems. Key metrics: 82% semantic search precision, adaptive chunking (200-1000 tokens), processes 5,000+ document chunks with under 9.5 second response latency, supports 20+ AI providers, and uses Pinecone/ChromaDB/Weaviate for vector storage.

### Data Notebook
An interactive data analysis workspace inspired by Jupyter but with modern web UX. Features code execution, rich visualization with Recharts, multi-format data import/export (CSV, Excel, JSON, SQL), and achieves 95+ Lighthouse performance score.

### Image-to-Sketch Converter
Deep learning project using CNN + GAN architecture for image transformation. Achieved 90% accuracy in sketch conversion with 30% faster processing through transfer learning and optimization.

### ChefSpeak
A voice-controlled cooking assistant using ElevenLabs for professional narration, supporting 5 languages with under 500ms voice interaction latency. Built as a PWA for offline capability.

## Technical Skills (Detailed)

Programming Languages: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, SQL, R, HTML, CSS
AI/ML Frameworks: TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, Pandas, NumPy, OpenCV
Web Development: React, Next.js, Vue.js, Svelte, Remix, Tailwind CSS, FastAPI, Node.js
Databases: MySQL, Neon, Pinecone, ChromaDB, Weaviate, Vector DBs
Visualization: Tableau, Power BI, Recharts
Cloud Platforms: AWS, Azure, Vercel
AI Tools: v0, Lovable, Bolt, Cursor, Windsurf, ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini
Specializations: Computer Vision, NLP, Deep Learning, RAG, Medical Imaging

## Professional Experience (Chronological)

1. Software Developer at DiligenceVault (January 2026 - Present)
   - Builds agent orchestration workflows for financial document AI processing
   - 82% semantic retrieval precision on 5,000+ document chunks
   - Reduced manual review effort by 60%
   - Production REST APIs for critical business functions

2. Research Intern at upGrad (January - April 2025)
   - Developed hybrid malware detection system combining Yara rules with ML
   - Cybersecurity research and threat detection

3. AI Evaluator & Trainer at Outlier.AI (November 2024 - January 2025)
   - Trained and evaluated generative AI models
   - Focused on mathematical content evaluation and reasoning improvement

4. Data Analyst Intern at Psyliq (January - February 2024)
   - HR data analysis with Power BI dashboards
   - 25% improvement in data comprehension for stakeholders

5. Senior Manager at AIESEC (January - December 2023)
   - Managed international professional exchange programs
   - Led teams and enhanced cross-cultural communication

## Education

Bachelor of Technology - Computer Science and Engineering
Specialization: Data Science (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning)
Lovely Professional University, Phagwara, Punjab, India
September 2021 - July 2025 | CGPA: 7.74
